executive_strategic_insight.core_theme: Maturing from EASM startup to enterprise attack surface platform with automated testing and risk prioritization
executive_strategic_insight.strategic_focus: CyCognito is deepening its EASM capabilities with automated security testing (not just discovery), risk-based prioritization using business context, and compliance mapping. They're betting that passive scanning is table stakes — the future is automated validation.
executive_strategic_insight.ecosystem_momentum: 10 new integrations including Splunk SOAR, ServiceNow VR, and Tenable.io bidirectional sync. Building 'EASM feeds your existing security stack' positioning.
executive_strategic_insight.persona_shift: Moving from security operations to CISO/risk management level. New features focus on board-ready reporting and business risk quantification.
executive_strategic_insight.pricing_model_shift: Enterprise annual contracts based on asset count. Added a 'CyCognito Essential' tier for mid-market ($50K+ ARR). Previously enterprise-only.

engineering_capacity.velocity_assessment: High — strong feature velocity with significant new capability additions each month

intelligence_signals.job_board_signals: Hiring enterprise AEs, customer success managers, and ML engineers. Sales + CS hiring suggests post-Series C scale-up focused on enterprise net retention.
intelligence_signals.target_users: CISOs, VP Security, risk management teams at enterprises with large external footprints (financial services, healthcare, tech)
intelligence_signals.monetization_approach: Enterprise SaaS with asset-based pricing. Adding mid-market tier suggests TAM expansion. Focus on multi-year contracts with expansion revenue from M&A discovery.
intelligence_signals.differentiators: Most comprehensive external attack surface discovery (including unknown assets). Automated security testing beyond just scanning. Business context-aware risk scoring.

gaps_exposed: CyCognito's automated security testing goes beyond Sentry EASM's passive scanning
Business context-aware prioritization not available in Securin
M&A/subsidiary asset discovery is a gap
Board-ready risk reporting and quantification not mature in Securin
areas_of_focus: Add automated security testing to Sentry EASM (beyond passive scanning)
Build business context layer for risk prioritization across all products
Invest in executive/board-ready reporting across platform
Add M&A asset discovery to Sentry EASM

product_specific.Sentry (EASM): CyCognito is the most direct competitor — their automated testing and business context scoring set a higher bar than passive EASM
product_specific.ASM: CyCognito's unknown asset discovery competes directly with ASM's core value proposition
product_specific.Core (VI): Their risk quantification approach could influence how customers evaluate vulnerability intelligence platforms
